File List

Here is a list of all documented files with brief descriptions:
/home/nightly/congaree-gx/2015-10-26.193953/build/install/tile/usr/lib/bme/usr/include/stdio.hA subset of the standard I/O library
/home/nightly/congaree-gx/2015-10-26.193953/build/install/tile/usr/lib/bme/usr/include/util.hRoutines to perform utility operations
/home/nightly/congaree-gx/2015-10-26.193953/build/install/tile/usr/lib/bme/usr/include/bme/bme_malloc.hBare Metal Environment heap memory allocation support
/home/nightly/congaree-gx/2015-10-26.193953/build/install/tile/usr/lib/bme/usr/include/bme/cfg.hRoutines to perform shim configuration operations
/home/nightly/congaree-gx/2015-10-26.193953/build/install/tile/usr/lib/bme/usr/include/bme/dtlb.hBare Metal Environment DTLB miss handling support
/home/nightly/congaree-gx/2015-10-26.193953/build/install/tile/usr/lib/bme/usr/include/bme/interrupts.hBare Metal Environment interrupt support
/home/nightly/congaree-gx/2015-10-26.193953/build/install/tile/usr/lib/bme/usr/include/bme/pa_alloc.hBare Metal Environment physical address allocator
/home/nightly/congaree-gx/2015-10-26.193953/build/install/tile/usr/lib/bme/usr/include/bme/state.hBare Metal Environment per-tile state support
/home/nightly/congaree-gx/2015-10-26.193953/build/install/tile/usr/lib/bme/usr/include/bme/sys_info.hBME global data structure and supporting types
/home/nightly/congaree-gx/2015-10-26.193953/build/install/tile/usr/lib/bme/usr/include/bme/tlb.hRoutines to perform TLB operations
/home/nightly/congaree-gx/2015-10-26.193953/build/install/tile/usr/lib/bme/usr/include/bme/tte.hBare Metal Environment translation table entry (TTE) support
/home/nightly/congaree-gx/2015-10-26.193953/build/install/tile/usr/lib/bme/usr/include/bme/types.hTypes used by BME routines
/home/nightly/congaree-gx/2015-10-26.193953/build/install/tile/usr/lib/bme/usr/include/bme/va_alloc.hBare Metal Environment virtual address allocator
/home/nightly/congaree-gx/2015-10-26.193953/build/install/tile/usr/lib/bme/usr/include/tmc/idn.hSupport for the IDN (I/O dynamic network)
/home/nightly/congaree-gx/2015-10-26.193953/build/install/tile/usr/lib/bme/usr/include/tmc/mem.hSupport for moving blocks of memory in and out of a Tile's cache
/home/nightly/congaree-gx/2015-10-26.193953/build/install/tile/usr/lib/bme/usr/include/tmc/mspace.hThe mspace parameterized heap API
/home/nightly/congaree-gx/2015-10-26.193953/build/install/tile/usr/lib/bme/usr/include/tmc/spin.hSpin-based memory synchronization primitives for use with one-task-per-core applications
/home/nightly/congaree-gx/2015-10-26.193953/build/install/tile/usr/lib/bme/usr/include/tmc/udn.hSupport for the UDN (user dynamic network)
